channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260611)
item.description:
What's New

feat(macro): add option to yield conflicting macros to macOS Text Replacement

XKey's event tap wins the race against macOS Text Replacement: macro

expansion deletes the shortcut before the system can match it, even in

fields that already showed the replacement preview bubble. This is

confusing when the same shortcut exists on both sides.

Add a global toggle that skips XKey macros whose shortcut (case-

insensitive) also exists in macOS Text Replacements, letting the system

replacement apply instead:

  • MacroManager reads NSUserDictionaryReplacementItems from the global

defaults domain into a lock-guarded lowercase shortcut set, refreshed

asynchronously with a 60s TTL only on macro hits; disabled toggle adds

zero typing overhead

  • Skip check covers both findMacro match paths (exact and auto-caps)
  • Plumb the setting through Preferences, SharedSettings

(XKey.yieldMacroToSystemReplacement), KeyboardEventHandler and

AppDelegate, mirroring addSpaceAfterMacro

  • Add the toggle to Macro settings with en/zh-Hans localization
  • Add MacroManager yield tests with an injectable shortcut set

Bump version to 1.2.24 (20260611).

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
